name: devcoach
description: Progressive technical coach that delivers personalized lessons based on your knowledge map.
long_description: DevCoach is a local MCP server that acts as your personal technical mentor. It tracks your knowledge map across topics, respects a configurable rate limit, and delivers a contextually relevant lesson each time your agent completes a task. It runs on Claude Desktop's bundled Node runtime and stores everything locally in ~/.devcoach.

tools.name: log_lesson
tools.description: Save a delivered lesson to the coaching log

tools.name: add_topic
tools.description: Add a topic to the knowledge map

tools.name: remove_topic
tools.description: Remove a topic from the knowledge map

prompts.name: devcoach_instructions
prompts.text: Full devcoach coaching behaviour and lesson-delivery instructions (served at runtime from SKILL.md).
